title: Allay Totem
description: Remodel of the Totem of Undying to be an Allay.
body:
![Text saying "Allay Totem"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/281463c363912b5009ce3174f9b7b13e9cecbf1d.png)

Remodel of the Totem of Undying.
Have a **cute little allay companion** or your side **protecting you from death**.

// This is created completely by me "Nziixx" and no other

### 3rd person "being held"
![How it looks when held in normal hand: 3rd person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/238a756535bcbff9c210a8293c33ffd0646822a6.jpeg)

![How it looks when held in offhand: 1st person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0cf0960604c5a15f2ab9cdbdc39f3bf38c2a523.jpeg)

## **Try it out!** Maybe it actually becomes a lifelong companion?
